name: Spense
description: Bank-native infrastructure letting financial institutions launch credit cards and credit lines backed by customer assets (FDs, mutual funds, equities, bonds, invoices, real estate) without replacing their existing stack.
signalSource: Entrackr weekly funding report + Inc42, week of Jun 29–Jul 4, 2026
whyNow: Just closed a $2.8M seed round (announced this week) to launch Credit Line on UPI (CLOU) — actively building banking partnerships and hiring, the window to reach founders is now before the round is fully allocated.
whySparrow: Direct Fintech thesis fit, Seed stage, India-based. Kunal Shah (Sparrow watchlist) is already a named angel on this round — a live warm path, not a cold approach.
recommendedAction: Draft warm intro request to Kunal Shah for a founder intro, referencing the CLOU (Credit Line on UPI) launch.
reciprocityHook: Share Sparrow’s read on Credit Line on UPI (CLOU) adoption curves — relevant to their GTM roadmap.
source: Angel Portfolio Update — Entrackr weekly funding report (Jun 29–Jul 4, 2026); Inc42; Indian Startup Times
warmPath: Kunal Shah (Sparrow watchlist, Founder CRED/FreeCharge) is a named angel on this round. Intro route: Kunal Shah → Spense founders.
nextAction: Draft warm intro request to Kunal Shah for a founder intro.

name: BCT Ventures
description: AI-native consumer brands platform building and scaling nutrition and wellness brands via three proprietary AI engines (product development, audience building, marketing execution).
whyNow: Just launched publicly with a Rs 42 Cr (~$5M) seed round this week — early enough that a syndicate allocation may still be open, but round size is large for a first check.
whySparrow: Consumer thesis fit, Seed stage, India, ex-Google founder pedigree. Caveat: Rs 42 Cr round is a large seed for a roll-up/brand-house model — confirm whether a $1–2M allocation is realistically available before prioritizing outreach.
recommendedAction: Add to CRM for follow-up; check with 3one4 Capital network whether the round has room for a smaller syndicate check.
notes: No named angel from Sparrow’s watchlist on this round — cold on warm path via individuals.
reciprocityHook: Share Sparrow’s data on nutrition/wellness D2C unit economics benchmarks in India.
warmPath: No named angel from the watchlist identified on this round — cold. Founder Kashyap Vadapalli is ex-Google, which overlaps Sparrow’s pedigree signal but not a direct intro path.
nextAction: Check with 3one4 Capital network for syndicate room.

name: Onpoint
description: Payment-agnostic consumer rewards platform that lets users earn additional reward points on everyday purchases through gift vouchers and partner brands — combinable with any existing credit card rewards or UPI cashback.
signalSource: Press — IndiaQuotient/First Cheque + Whiteboard Capital, Jul 7 2026
whyNow: Consumer loyalty is a $2B+ market in India. Payment-agnostic model unlocks every UPI and card transaction simultaneously. Ex-Zeta founders bring payments infra DNA that banks trust — critical for merchant onboarding.
whySparrow: Consumer + Fintech adjacent — dual thesis edge. Pre-seed = Sparrow’s ideal window. Ex-Meta + Google + Uber + Zeta pedigree is top-tier for consumer fintech. IndiaQuotient (First Cheque) validation from one of India’s most respected early-stage funds.
recommendedAction: Request intro via IndiaQuotient (Madhukar Sinha). Reference CRED loyalty thesis and Sparrow’s fintech conviction. Move fast — this round will attract competition.
reciprocityHook: Share Sparrow’s analysis of payment-agnostic loyalty models globally (Bumped, Dosh in US) and India UPI rewards penetration data
source: Raise Announced — Press coverage, IndiaQuotient + Whiteboard Capital, Jul 7 2026
warmPath: Founders ex-Zeta (payments infra) — Kunal Shah (CRED, watchlist) has deep loyalty/rewards thesis overlap and is an intro path node. IndiaQuotient’s Madhukar Sinha is directly reachable for co-investor intro.
nextAction: Request intro via IndiaQuotient (Madhukar Sinha). Reference CRED loyalty thesis.

name: Brekfuz
description: AI-native enterprise coordination platform that unifies company knowledge across Slack, GitHub, email, and documentation tools into one searchable layer employees can query in natural language — also maps ownership and expertise to reduce key-person dependency.
founderPedigree: Action Required: Analyst — pedigree not confirmed from public sources
signalSource: Press — Pear VC + Pareto Holdings + Collective Global, Jul 1 2026
whyNow: Enterprise knowledge management is one of the fastest-moving AI categories post-LLM. India-first at seed means no local competition yet. Glean ($4.6B valuation) proves the category globally.
whySparrow: AI + B2B dual thesis hit. India HQ (Gurugram), seed stage = Sparrow window. Caveat: lead investor Pear VC is US-only, no watchlist investor on round; founder pedigree not yet confirmed from tier-1 India employer/school.
recommendedAction: Research founders’ backgrounds before outreach — confirm IIT/IIM or tier-1 employer. If confirmed, move to High. If not, hold at watch list.
notes: Founder pedigree not confirmed from public sources. No watchlist investor on round. Pear VC is US-focused — limited warm path.
reciprocityHook: Share Glean/Guru/Notion AI benchmarks and how Indian enterprises are evaluating knowledge management tools vs. global alternatives
source: Raise Announced — Press coverage, Pear VC + Pareto Holdings + Collective Global, Jul 1 2026
warmPath: Cold — Pear VC is US-focused, no named investor from Sparrow’s watchlist identified. No shared ex-employer link confirmed yet. Route: research founders on LinkedIn for any IIT/IIM alumni connection.
nextAction: Research founders — confirm pedigree before outreach. If IIT/IIM/tier-1 employer confirmed, move to High and draft outreach.

name: CUNIN
hq: Action Required: Analyst — city not confirmed from public sources
description: Culture-led lifestyle brand building a Gen Z identity brand starting with fragrances (carryable perfume accessories) and plans to expand into broader lifestyle categories (apparel, accessories). Debut collection 'The World of Antonyms' uses personality-driven motifs to invite customers to express different facets of identity.

founders.name: Kunal Shukla
founders.background: Built NEWME from Day Zero (product strategy, marketing, partnerships, offline expansion). Prior: built and exited cloud kitchen + Foodeo (F&B tech, incubated by Razorpay Rize).

founders.name: Amish Bibhu
founders.background: Led buying, merchandising, and category expansion across 14 categories at NEWME.

founders.name: Afsal Ashraf
founders.background: Built NEWME's finance and operations infrastructure for ~4 years supporting rapid omnichannel growth.

signalSource: IndianStartupNews + D2cInsider Pulse + IndianRetailer + SMEStreet, Jul 4 2026
whyNow: Pre-seed just closed — earliest possible window to build relationship before the next (Seed) round. All In Capital (watchlist) is already on the cap table, giving a live warm path to founders today.
whySparrow: Consumer thesis fit, pre-seed, India. All In Capital (Sparrow watchlist #14) co-led the round — direct warm intro path exists now. Founders are ex-NEWME operators who know D2C scale. Caution: physical product brand with no confirmed software wedge; round size ($450K) too small for Sparrow's $1–2M check today — position for co-invest at Seed.
recommendedAction: Reach out to All In Capital to get on the founder's radar ahead of the Seed round. Do not lead now — monitor for 6–9 months and revisit when Seed round opens.
notes: Round too small for Sparrow's typical $1–2M check at current stage. This is a 'plant flag' entry — use All In Capital relationship to stay close and move when Seed round opens. Confirm HQ city.
reciprocityHook: Share data on Gen Z fragrance/lifestyle brand unit economics in India — SUGAR Cosmetics, House of Beauty comparable benchmarks, and D2C loyalty retention data.
source: Raise Announced — IndianStartupNews, D2cInsider Pulse, IndianRetailer (Jul 4 2026)
warmPath: All In Capital (Sparrow watchlist fund #14) co-led this round. Intro route: All In Capital → CUNIN founders directly. Huddle Ventures (secondary co-lead) is a secondary warm path.
nextAction: Reach out to All In Capital to flag interest and get on founders' radar. Position for co-invest at Seed (expected 9–15 months out).

name: PlayBlue
description: India's first omnichannel multi-brand sports retail platform — 100+ global and homegrown brands across athleisure, footwear, equipment, and nutrition in curated experiential stores backed by a unified digital platform with expert buying guidance and quick delivery.
founderPedigree: Action Required: Analyst — no IIT/IIM/pedigree employer confirmed from public sources
whyNow: Organised sports retail in India is fragmented and offline-first. First flagship store in Bengaluru (15,000 sq ft) opens the omnichannel wedge. Target ₹100 Cr revenue before next round.
whySparrow: Consumer thesis fit, India HQ, Seed stage. However: physical-retail-heavy play with no confirmed IIT/IIM pedigree and no watchlist investor on round — falls below the High bar. Monitor; upgrade if AI/data layer becomes primary product.
recommendedAction: Watch list — add to 6-month follow-up cadence. Revisit if platform GMV and digital-first metrics are strong at first revenue milestone.
notes: Physical retail-heavy model. No pedigree or watchlist investor signal. Round size ($2.7M) slightly above Sparrow's typical first check. Monitor for platform/data angle.
reciprocityHook: Share India sports retail market sizing data and comparable global models (Decathlon India unit economics, Sports Authority playbook)
warmPath: Cold — no watchlist investor, no confirmed shared ex-employer with existing pipeline. Centre Court Capital (sports-focused fund) is the potential intro route.
nextAction: Watch list — 6-month follow-up. Confirm founder pedigree before any outreach.

name: Fermi.ai
description: AI-first STEM tutoring platform for high-school students (grades 8–12) in math, physics, chemistry. Acts as a digital tutor that guides students through problem-solving without giving direct answers — prompts, identifies faulty reasoning, and offers hints only when needed. Runs on frontier models with a proprietary 'GE bench' to select the best model per subject.

founders.name: Mukesh Bansal
founders.background: Co-founder Myntra (sold to Flipkart ~$300M), Executive Chairman Cult.fit, founding partner Meraki Labs. On Sparrow watchlist (i19) as an angel — now also founding Fermi.ai.

founders.name: Peeyush Ranjan
founders.background: Ex-Google VP/GM (India & Southeast Asia), ex-Flipkart CTO. Former Airbnb executive. Top-tier operator pedigree.

signalSource: Ashby (jobs.ashbyhq.com/Meraki%20AI), Jul 2026 — 'Junior Full Stack Founding Engineer' in HSR, Bengaluru, 5-day on-site, immediate joiners preferred
whyNow: Launched publicly Jan 23, 2026. Currently backed only by Meraki Labs (founders' own fund — no external capital). Founding engineer hire in Bengaluru is the classic pre-raise signal — external round is 3–9 months out. This is the window to build a relationship before the deck goes out.
whySparrow: AI thesis fit (applied AI tutoring, not a research lab). Consumer/edtech with massive India TAM (millions of STEM students, Byju's collapse left the market open). Founders carry the highest possible pedigree: Mukesh Bansal (Sparrow watchlist i19) + ex-Flipkart CTO / ex-Google VP. The watchlist hit IS the founder — no intro chain needed.
recommendedAction: Direct outreach to Mukesh Bansal — he is both on Sparrow's watchlist AND is the co-founder of this company. Ask whether external fundraising is being scoped. Reference Fermi.ai's STEM thesis and Sparrow's AI/consumer conviction.
notes: Geography caveat: Singapore registered HQ, Bengaluru team, India student market. Not 100% India-first HQ but pedigree + watchlist hit overrides the caveat — treat as India-borderline, pursue. Team is 10 people, entirely tech-focused. EdTech slots under Consumer + AI, both in-thesis. Byju's collapse has left a trust vacuum and demand gap that Fermi.ai is positioned to fill.
reciprocityHook: Share Sparrow's read on India's AI-tutoring market sizing post-Byju's — the demand gap, how students and parents are making decisions now, and relevant EdTech demand data from 2025–26. Fermi.ai is early enough that market intelligence is more valuable than capital right now.
source: Stealth/Hiring Signal — Ashby job board (jobs.ashbyhq.com via Meraki Labs), Jul 2026; confirmed via public press: Inc42, BusinessToday, PRNewswire (Jan 23, 2026 launch announcement)
warmPath: Mukesh Bansal (Sparrow watchlist i19, Co-Founder Myntra/Cult.fit) IS the co-founder of Fermi.ai. If Sparrow has any prior relationship with Mukesh Bansal from his angel investing activity, this is a direct founder conversation — no intro chain required. Peeyush Ranjan (ex-Flipkart CTO) is also a top-pedigree node for the Flipkart alumni network.
nextAction: Direct outreach to Mukesh Bansal — founder AND watchlist angel. Ask if external fundraising is being scoped and offer to be a thought partner on go-to-market before the round.
